place.summary: Hong Kong Observation Wheel functions primarily as a connector in Hong Kong's visitor network. Its strongest observed source market is PH. It receives notable inbound connections from Hong Kong Disneyland. Visitors often continue to Hong Kong Disneyland. Its observed experience trails the category average, despite existing visitor demand.

opportunity_cards.title: Frequent companion: Hong Kong Disneyland
opportunity_cards.detail: Hong Kong Observation Wheel frequently appears alongside Hong Kong Disneyland, suggesting cross-promotion or route packaging potential.

opportunity_cards.title: High visibility, weaker experience
opportunity_cards.detail: Hong Kong Observation Wheel draws meaningful traffic but performs below its category average on experience.
